<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400" width="100%" height="100%">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#060913"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="150" fill="none" stroke="#1c233a" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="5,5"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="100" fill="none" stroke="#2a365c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#ff4500" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="200" y1="20" x2="200" y2="380" stroke="#1c233a" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <line x1="20" y1="200" x2="380" y2="200" stroke="#1c233a" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <path d="M 80,80 L 60,80 L 60,100" fill="none" stroke="#d0e1f9" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
  <path d="M 320,80 L 340,80 L 340,100" fill="none" stroke="#d0e1f9" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
  <path d="M 80,320 L 60,320 L 60,300" fill="none" stroke="#d0e1f9" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
  <path d="M 320,320 L 340,320 L 340,300" fill="none" stroke="#d0e1f9" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
  <polygon points="200,110 240,180 200,290 160,180" fill="url(#grad-fire-1)" opacity="0.8"/>
  <polygon points="200,140 225,200 200,270 175,200" fill="url(#grad-fire-2)" opacity="0.9"/>
  <polygon points="200,180 212,220 200,260 188,220" fill="#ffea7a" opacity="0.95"/>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="grad-fire-1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff4500" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#12131a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="grad-fire-2" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff8c00" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2b1b0a" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
</svg>
